tools.name: archiveApplication.postOperation
tools.description: Archive application.

tools.name: archiveWave.postOperation
tools.description: Archive wave.

tools.name: associateApplications.postOperation
tools.description: Associate applications to wave.

tools.name: associateSourceServers.postOperation
tools.description: Associate source servers to application.

tools.name: changeServerLifeCycleState.postOperation
tools.description: Allows the user to set the SourceServer.LifeCycle.state property for specific Source Server IDs to one of the following: READY_FOR_TEST or READY_FOR_CUTOVER. This command only works if the Source Server is already launchable (dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration is not null.)

tools.name: createApplication.postOperation
tools.description: Create application.

tools.name: createLaunchConfigurationTemplate.postOperation
tools.description: Creates a new Launch Configuration Template.

tools.name: createReplicationConfigurationTemplate.postOperation
tools.description: Creates a new ReplicationConfigurationTemplate.

tools.name: createWave.postOperation
tools.description: Create wave.

tools.name: deleteApplication.postOperation
tools.description: Delete application.

tools.name: deleteJob.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a single Job by ID.

tools.name: deleteLaunchConfigurationTemplate.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a single Launch Configuration Template by ID.

tools.name: deleteReplicationConfigurationTemplate.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a single Replication Configuration Template by ID

tools.name: deleteSourceServer.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a single source server by ID.

tools.name: deleteVcenterClient.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a given vCenter client by ID.

tools.name: deleteWave.postOperation
tools.description: Delete wave.

tools.name: describeJobLogItems.postOperation
tools.description: Retrieves detailed job log items with paging.

tools.name: describeJobs.postOperation
tools.description: Returns a list of Jobs. Use the JobsID and fromDate and toData filters to limit which jobs are returned. The response is sorted by creationDataTime - latest date first. Jobs are normally created by the StartTest, StartCutover, and TerminateTargetInstances APIs. Jobs are also created by DiagnosticLaunch and TerminateDiagnosticInstances, which are APIs available only to *Support* and only used in response to relevant support tickets.

tools.name: describeLaunchConfigurationTemplates.postOperation
tools.description: Lists all Launch Configuration Templates, filtered by Launch Configuration Template IDs

tools.name: describeReplicationConfigurationTemplates.postOperation
tools.description: Lists all ReplicationConfigurationTemplates, filtered by Source Server IDs.

tools.name: describeSourceServers.postOperation
tools.description: Retrieves all SourceServers or multiple SourceServers by ID.

tools.name: describeVcenterClients.getOperation
tools.description: Returns a list of the installed vCenter clients.

tools.name: disassociateApplications.postOperation
tools.description: Disassociate applications from wave.

tools.name: disassociateSourceServers.postOperation
tools.description: Disassociate source servers from application.

tools.name: disconnectFromService.postOperation
tools.description: Disconnects specific Source Servers from Application Migration Service. Data replication is stopped immediately. All AWS resources created by Application Migration Service for enabling the replication of these source servers will be terminated / deleted within 90 minutes. Launched Test or Cutover instances will NOT be terminated. If the agent on the source server has not been prevented from communicating with the Application Migration Service service, then it will receive a command to uninstall itself (within approximately 10 minutes). The following properties of the SourceServer will be changed immediately: dataReplicationInfo.dataReplicationState will be set to DISCONNECTED; The totalStorageBytes property for each of dataReplicationInfo.replicatedDisks will be set to zero; dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration and dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration will be nullified.

tools.name: finalizeCutover.postOperation
tools.description: Finalizes the cutover immediately for specific Source Servers. All AWS resources created by Application Migration Service for enabling the replication of these source servers will be terminated / deleted within 90 minutes. Launched Test or Cutover instances will NOT be terminated. The AWS Replication Agent will receive a command to uninstall itself (within 10 minutes). The following properties of the SourceServer will be changed immediately: dataReplicationInfo.dataReplicationState will be changed to DISCONNECTED; The SourceServer.lifeCycle.state will be changed to CUTOVER; The totalStorageBytes property fo each of dataReplicationInfo.replicatedDisks will be set to zero; dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration and dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration will be nullified.

tools.name: getLaunchConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Lists all LaunchConfigurations available, filtered by Source Server IDs.

tools.name: getReplicationConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Lists all ReplicationConfigurations, filtered by Source Server ID.

tools.name: initializeService.postOperation
tools.description: Initialize Application Migration Service.

tools.name: listApplications.postOperation
tools.description: Retrieves all applications or multiple applications by ID.

tools.name: listExportErrors.postOperation
tools.description: List export errors.

tools.name: listExports.postOperation
tools.description: List exports.

tools.name: listImportErrors.postOperation
tools.description: List import errors.

tools.name: listImports.postOperation
tools.description: List imports.

tools.name: listSourceServerActions.postOperation
tools.description: List source server post migration custom actions.

tools.name: listTemplateActions.postOperation
tools.description: List template post migration custom actions.

tools.name: listWaves.postOperation
tools.description: Retrieves all waves or multiple waves by ID.

tools.name: markAsArchived.postOperation
tools.description: Archives specific Source Servers by setting the SourceServer.isArchived property to true for specified SourceServers by ID. This command only works for SourceServers with a lifecycle. state which equals DISCONNECTED or CUTOVER.

tools.name: putSourceServerAction.postOperation
tools.description: Put source server post migration custom action.

tools.name: putTemplateAction.postOperation
tools.description: Put template post migration custom action.

tools.name: removeSourceServerAction.postOperation
tools.description: Remove source server post migration custom action.

tools.name: removeTemplateAction.postOperation
tools.description: Remove template post migration custom action.

tools.name: retryDataReplication.postOperation
tools.description: Causes the data replication initiation sequence to begin immediately upon next Handshake for specified SourceServer IDs, regardless of when the previous initiation started. This command will not work if the SourceServer is not stalled or is in a DISCONNECTED or STOPPED state.

tools.name: startCutover.postOperation
tools.description: Launches a Cutover Instance for specific Source Servers. This command starts a LAUNCH job whose initiatedBy property is StartCutover and changes the SourceServer.lifeCycle.state property to CUTTING_OVER.

tools.name: startExport.postOperation
tools.description: Start export.

tools.name: startImport.postOperation
tools.description: Start import.

tools.name: startReplication.postOperation
tools.description: Starts replication for SNAPSHOT_SHIPPING agents.

tools.name: startTest.postOperation
tools.description: Launches a Test Instance for specific Source Servers. This command starts a LAUNCH job whose initiatedBy property is StartTest and changes the SourceServer.lifeCycle.state property to TESTING.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: List all tags for your Application Migration Service resources.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds or overwrites only the specified tags for the specified Application Migration Service resource or resources. When you specify an existing tag key, the value is overwritten with the new value. Each resource can have a maximum of 50 tags. Each tag consists of a key and optional value.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Deletes the specified set of tags from the specified set of Application Migration Service resources.

tools.name: terminateTargetInstances.postOperation
tools.description: Starts a job that terminates specific launched EC2 Test and Cutover instances. This command will not work for any Source Server with a lifecycle.state of TESTING, CUTTING_OVER, or CUTOVER.

tools.name: unarchiveApplication.postOperation
tools.description: Unarchive application.

tools.name: unarchiveWave.postOperation
tools.description: Unarchive wave.

tools.name: updateApplication.postOperation
tools.description: Update application.

tools.name: updateLaunchConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Updates multiple LaunchConfigurations by Source Server ID.

tools.name: updateLaunchConfigurationTemplate.postOperation
tools.description: Updates an existing Launch Configuration Template by ID.

tools.name: updateReplicationConfiguration.postOperation
tools.description: Allows you to update multiple ReplicationConfigurations by Source Server ID.

tools.name: updateReplicationConfigurationTemplate.postOperation
tools.description: Updates multiple ReplicationConfigurationTemplates by ID.

tools.name: updateSourceServerReplicationType.postOperation
tools.description: Allows you to change between the AGENT_BASED replication type and the SNAPSHOT_SHIPPING replication type.

tools.name: updateWave.postOperation
tools.description: Update wave.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
